creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I few things I spotted

PORTVERSION --> DISTVERSION
See "Table 5.2. Package Naming Examples" in Porters Handbook

http://www.nlnetlabs.nl - redirects to https
ftp.rhnet.is doesn't seem to resolve

LIB_DEPENDS+= should be LIB_DEPENDS=

CONFLICTS= can probably be removed by now?

Best regards,
Daniel
